product.title: 4 in 1 Color Changing Foundation with SPF 50 - Moisturizing Medium-Full Coverage Concealer, Medium Spectrum Foundation Cream, Long-Lasting Lightweight Makeup Liquid, Natural Look Cosmetics
featureBullets: 【4-IN-1 MULTITASKING FORMULA】 SPF 50 sunscreen + Waterproof &Sweatproof + Full Coverage + Hydration – Reduces touch-ups for gym, swimming, or humid climates, protects your skin from UV light while providing a smooth and even look

【SMART COLOR ADAPTATION】 Color matching foundation contains shade-sensing beads which are encapsulated pigments that can deliver shade transformation upon blending into skin, adjust from cool to warm tones
【SKIN-CARE INFUSED】 Enriched with SODIUM HYALURONATE & ALLANTOIN to moisturize while concealing acne scars, dark circles, and redness
【FLAWLESS COVERAGE】 Buildable medium-full coverage Concealer is the perfect blend of skin care and makeup
【SWEAT PROOF FOUNDATION】 LONG-LASTING for daily application or for gym, workouts and dancing class , Safe for ALL SKIN TYPES, especially mature skin

specification.value: #20,787 in Beauty & Personal Care (See Top 100 in Beauty & Personal Care) #213 in Foundation Makeup
Breathable, Lightweight, Long Lasting, Travel Size

reviewsInfo.customersSay: Customers find the foundation matches their skin color perfectly and gives a flawless glowing look, with a smooth, creamy texture that feels like a moisturizer. They appreciate its lightweight feel and easy application, and one customer notes it stays on all day. The coverage and moisturizing effects receive mixed feedback - while some say it provides good coverage and moisturizes well, others report it doesn't cover well and breaks out their skin.

reviews.reviewText: Great product. I'm over 50 and the coverage was better than I expected. The first time I put it on the color was a dark orange, but as I blended it in the color changed to match my skin tone. I would definitely purchase this item again.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 10, 2026

reviews.reviewText: I recently started using this color matching foundation because I was having such a hard time getting someone to find the right color for me at the make up counter in the store's. It was really getting annoying because I would leave the store and look in the mirror when I got to my car and I would look terrible or my husband would laugh at me when I got home. I love the color matching foundation! It is perfect for me and it really does work. I have a light to medium complexion and freckles and it is just perfect. It goes on so nicely and has a natural look and I am almost 70 years old. Easy application and no greasiness...I am so glad I have found this product!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on October 28, 2025

reviews.reviewTitle: Full coverage in a nice lightweight finish
reviews.reviewText: Pleasantly surprised at the quality of this product. The coverage is thorough and very natural looking. The medium was a perfect color match for me yet perfectly camouflage for my pigmented areas of concern .thank you for great value for a great product
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on December 2, 2025

reviews.reviewText: I love this foundation. It goes on smoothly. Color matches great. My skin is dry so when I put anything on my face it gets flakey.... Not with this stuff! It works great. I finally found something I love. The only reason I have a 4 star and not a 5 is because I ordered a 2 pack and the second bottle doesn't work. I push the pump for it to come out and nothing comes out. Otherwise a great product and great price!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 14, 2026

reviews.reviewText: This foundation is easy to apply and I’m pleased with the natural look it gives
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 25, 2026

reviews.reviewTitle: This blends to your face tone!!!!
reviews.reviewText: I use this every day, not a heavy coverage, very light, like a lightweight face cream. Goes on white but matches to your skin tone as soon as you blend it in. This is the only foundation I use now and have for the past year. Love love love this!!!!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 14, 2026

reviews.reviewText: No coverage, very light if any. Not for mature skin. Feels tacky after applying. Saw no real color change. Does give complexion a slight glow. Ordered the 2 pack set. One bottle would not pump. The beauty blender is a nice quality.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on January 9, 2026

reviews.reviewTitle: I'm astonished it actually does what it says!
reviews.reviewText: I hate writing reviews but I was so surprisingly pleased with the performance of this foundation I figured I'd leave one because I remembered it had very few. I'm 53 years old with rosacea so I tend to have really light skin with bright red cheeks and nose. I have a hell of a time matching foundation because every part of my face is a different color and it's never the right shade. On the rare occasion I find one close, it either sinks into the cracks and fine lines, and makes me look 10 years older, or is really thick and heavy, and makes me feel sweaty and sticky. I almost never wear makeup because it's so hard to find comfortable products that look good. I wasn't holding out a lot of hope for this one because it was reasonably priced and claims to change color to match your skin and give good coverage, but I was in need of a new bottle of something so I figured I'd give it a try. Imagine my astonishment when it actually worked! I used a makeup brush and squeezed the foundation directly on to it. It came out of the tube white. I brushed it down my cheeks and with a couple strokes it blended in perfectly. It evened out my bright red cheeks and nose and gave a smooth matte finish to my whole face. And to top it off it did not sink into the fine lines. I am absolutely thrilled with this Foundation. The best part was I couldn't even feel it on my face. It didn't feel like I was wearing a mask. It just did what it said it would. I am so incredibly happy with this purchase I may actually start wearing makeup on a regular basis because this made it so easy. I will continue to buy this brand. It actually works.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on December 27, 2025
